name: EXTRAMEDULLARY HEMATOPOIESIS
definition: abnormal deposits of hematopoietic tissue outside bone marrow ← deficient bone marrow
distribution: focal isodense masses on enhanced CT
discriminating_features: focal isodense masses on enhanced CT
uni- / bilateral smooth lobulated paraspinal masses between T8 and T12
anterior rib ends expanded by masses

Spleen: focal isodense masses on enhanced CT
Thorax: mediastinum, heart, thymus, pleu: uni- / bilateral smooth lobulated paraspinal masses between T8 and T12
anterior rib ends expanded by masses
Retroperitoneum (uncommon): hyper- / isoattenuating masses in paravertebral region ± macroscopic fat on CT
hypointense mass on T1WI + T2WI ← red marrow / hemosiderin content
hyperintense on T1WI + T2WI ← fat tissue
